date.intro: Choose the date you want to request a correction for. We'll load your stamps for that day: you can edit one or add a missing one.
date.label: Date

pickStamp.intro: Select a stamp to correct, or add a missing one.

edit.justificationPlaceholder: E.g. I forgot to clock out

error.justificationTooShort: Please explain the reason in at least 5 characters.
